title: Trump Warns Iran of 'Very Traumatic' Consequences
detail: President Trump escalates rhetoric, publicly warning Iran it must reach a deal within one month or face 'very traumatic' consequences. The statement comes a day after his summit with Netanyahu and signals growing impatience with the Oman-mediated indirect talks. European allies call for restraint while Iran's Foreign Ministry dismisses the warnings as 'psychological warfare.'

title: Satellite Imagery Reveals Isfahan Underground Activity
detail: Institute for Science and International Security (ISIS) publishes satellite analysis showing massive logistical operations at Isfahan's underground nuclear tunnel complex. Iran is sealing tunnel entrances to protect enrichment infrastructure from potential strikes and transferring centrifuges from other sites to establish protected production lines deep inside the mountain. IAEA confirms it cannot verify the full scope of Iran's enrichment activities.
